roadmapPageDescription: Your personal project dashboard. View your assigned tasks, progress overview, recent activity, and quick actions.
todoPageDescription: View and manage all upcoming tasks and user stories in the product todo list.
boardPageDescription: Visual Kanban board to track task status and team progress in real-time.
reportsPageDescription: Project insights, burndown charts, velocity reports, and team performance metrics.
issuesPageDescription: Track, manage, and resolve all project issues and bugs efficiently.
codePageDescription: Access source code, repositories, branches, and pull requests.
releasesPageDescription: Plan, track, and manage product releases and deployment versions.
projectSettingsPageDescription: Configure project details, members, workflows, integrations, and permissions.
